extract: Nidorino (Japanese: ニドリーノ Nidorino) is a Poison-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Nidoran♂ starting at level 16 and evolves into Nidoking when exposed to a Moon Stone. Nidorino is related to the Nidoran♀ line, serving as Nidorina's male counterpart. Starting in Generation V, it can produce eggs that contain either Nidoran♂ or Nidoran♀ when bred with Ditto.
